name: Erik
description:
“¡Ay, dios mio! I believe you! You don’t have to show me!”

Erik is your brand new roommate, and he has a pretty bad sleepwalking condition. He doesn’t just walk when he sleeps; he fucks. He may have forgotten to mention that part to you when you moved in.

Not Holiday centred, but it does take place near the holidays.

(Art by Unknown)
creator: CrunchyBen
